message:
fix: improve bd dolt nocgo stubs and JSON output completeness

- Register subcommands (show, set, test) in nocgo stub so they give
  the CGO error instead of cobra "unknown command"
- Handle --json output in nocgo stub, matching migrate_dolt_cmd_nocgo pattern
- Always include host/port/user defaults in bd dolt show --json for
  embedded mode, so agents can discover server config before switching

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
